title: campanula cervicaria var. longifolia
intro: Campanula cervicaria var. longifolia, also known as bellflower, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Campanulaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Campanula cervicaria var. longifolia include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
